message:
audit: fresh-eyes audit batches 467-468 — diff audit + deep audit, 14 files, all SOUND

Batch 467: Diff audit of HEAD~5..HEAD (5 commits, 12 files, ~800 insertions).
Files: raptorq_benchmark.rs, watch.rs, doctor/mod.rs, interceptor.rs,
server.rs, body.rs, replay.rs, runtime.rs, conformance.rs, remote.rs,
grpc_verification.rs, raptorq_perf_invariants.rs — all SOUND.

Batch 468: Deep fresh-eyes audit of 2 files (~7,300 lines).
- src/messaging/cut.rs (3757L): CutCertificate, 4 mobility operations,
  incident rehearsal, CutLatticeIndex compaction, BranchRegistry. SOUND.
- src/messaging/federation.rs (3546L): ~1000 new lines of distributed
  supervision (DistributedRestartEnvelope, DistributedSupervisionCompiler,
  mailbox/monitor/link/lease/failover plans). SOUND.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
